impact: This advances the PP&D plan by proving the committed lifecycle source coverage fixture validates cleanly and rejects missing provenance metadata, private/session artifacts, raw bodies, credentials, local capture artifacts, downloaded documents, and uncited category evidence claims before later lifecycle extraction work depends on it.
summary: Add a one-file lifecycle source coverage fail-closed validator test.
target_task: Task checkbox-14: Add a one-file validation-only lifecycle source coverage fail-closed test against `ppd/tests/fixtures/source_inventory/permit_lifecycle_source_coverage_report.json`: first assert the committed fixture is valid, then mutate one field at a time for missing `evidence[].authorityLabel`, missing `evidence[].recrawlCadence`, private DevHub paths, raw response bodies, credentials, traces, screenshots, downloaded documents, and uncited `coverageCategories[].evidenceIds` claims.

command: files=$(find ppd -name '*.ts' -not -path '*/node_modules/*' -print); test -z "$files" || npx tsc --noEmit --target ES2020 --module ESNext --moduleResolution node --strict --skipLibCheck --types node $files
